bonded.configuration.title: Bonded
konfig.config.bonded.title: Bonded Configuration
bonded.config.info.common.text: Server-synced gameplay settings for gear upgrades, repair benches, item progression, and bonus loot.
bonded.config.info.client.text: Client settings control Bonded item tooltip details, progression sounds, repair or upgrade bench HUD previews, and over-repair item bar color.
bonded.config.info.features.text: Feature toggles control which Bonded gameplay systems are active and whether players see chat progress feedback.
bonded.config.info.progression.text: Progression settings decide how quickly gear gains Bond and when it becomes ready to upgrade.
bonded.config.info.repair_and_loot.text: Repair and loot settings control how players maintain bonded gear and find extra Scrap.
bonded.config.info.tooltips.text: Tooltip settings control extra Bonded details shown on items in your own client.
bonded.config.info.hud.text: HUD settings control local repair and upgrade previews, plus the item bar color used for over-repaired gear.
bonded.config.info.sounds.text: Sound settings control local Bonded progression feedback heard by your own client.
commands.bonded.item_experience.no_item: %s must hold an item in their main hand.
commands.bonded.item_experience.invalid_: %s's held item cannot gain Bonded experience.
commands.bonded.item_experience.no_chang: No Bonded item experience was changed.
commands.bonded.item_experience.add.poin: Added %s Bonded item experience points to %s's %s.
Added %s Bonded item experience points to %s held items.
commands.bonded.item_experience.add.leve: Added %s Bonded levels to %s held items.
commands.bonded.item_experience.set.poin: Bonded item experience points must be less than the amount needed for the next level.
Set %s's %s Bonded item experience points to %s.
Set Bonded item experience points to %s for %s held items.
commands.bonded.item_experience.set.leve: Bonded item levels must be between 1 and the configured maximum level.
Set Bonded levels to %s for %s held items.
bonded.config.upgrading_enabled.tooltip: If enabled players can upgrade gear on tool benches when the gear reaches max level.
bonded.config.upgrading_enabled.info: When enabled, gear that reaches max level can be upgraded at a Tool Bench.
bonded.config.repairing_enabled.tooltip: If enabled players can repair gear on repair benches.
bonded.config.repairing_enabled.info: When enabled, players can restore damaged gear at a Repair Bench.
bonded.config.levels_to_upgrade.tooltip: To what level a gear can level. Once a gear is max level it can be upgraded.
bonded.config.levels_to_upgrade.info: Higher values make each upgrade tier take longer to finish before the gear can be upgraded.
bonded.config.weapon_damage_dealt_experi: Higher values make weapons gain Bond faster from damage dealt.
bonded.config.experience_for_mining_ores: Experience gained when bonded mining gear breaks ore blocks.
bonded.config.armor_damage_taken_experie: Higher values make armor gain Bond faster from damage taken while worn.
bonded.config.durability_gained_on_repai: Controls how much durability each repair action restores. A value of 1.0 restores a full durability bar.
bonded.config.send_chat_messages.info: Level-up and max-level messages help players notice Bond progress without checking item tooltips.
bonded.config.default_experience_for_unk: Default Max Experience For Unknown Items
Used when an item does not have a more specific progression rule.
bonded.config.tooltips_enabled.tooltip: You can disable the tooltips if you're having issues with them.
bonded.config.tooltips_enabled.info: Controls whether your client shows Bonded level, experience, and bonus details in item tooltips.
bonded.config.bench_hud_enabled.info: Shows repair and upgrade previews while you look at Bonded benches.
bonded.config.over_repair_bar_color.info: Changes the color used for temporary over-repair durability on item bars.
bonded.config.progression_sounds_enabled: Plays Bonded level-up and max-level sounds only for your own client.
bonded.config.progression_sound_volume.i: Controls how loud Bonded level-up and max-level sounds are on your client.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_enabled.t: If enabled, gear created by chest loot and monster gear rolls starts with some bond.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_enabled.i: Allows eligible loot-generated gear to start with Bond instead of always beginning at zero.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_min.toolt: Minimum bond applied to eligible gear created by world loot.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_min.info: The lowest starting Bond value eligible loot-generated gear can receive.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_max.toolt: Maximum bond applied to eligible gear created by world loot.
bonded.config.innate_loot_bond_max.info: The highest starting Bond value eligible loot-generated gear can receive.
bonded.config.chest_scrap_chance.tooltip: Chance for vanilla chest loot tables to include Scrap.
bonded.config.chest_scrap_chance.info: Chance for vanilla chest loot tables to include extra Scrap. Set this to 0 to disable chest Scrap.
bonded.config.armored_enemy_scrap_chance: Chance for non-player enemies wearing armor to drop Scrap when killed.
Chance for non-player enemies wearing armor to drop Scrap when killed.
bonded.config.broken_gear_scrap_cap.tool: Maximum Scrap dropped when bonded gear breaks.
bonded.config.broken_gear_scrap_cap.info: Caps the Scrap recovered from a bonded item when it breaks.

advancements.bonded.a_new_form.descripti: Upgrade gear at a Tool Bench.
